name: foodapp-microservices
description: Root package to run all microservices concurrently

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../analyzer-service && npm install && cd ../report-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install && cd ../builder-service && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:api" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:analyzer" "npm run start:report" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:builder" "npm run start:frontend"
